title: Friendermite
body: This mod is pretty straightforward. Endermans will not attack Endermites anymore, so they cannot be used to make an Enderman farm. This mod has been requested by Shivaxi for RLCraft. Looking for a server to play with your friends. Our sponsor got you covered: [ ](https://bisecthosting.com/teamcreative) Use the promo code teamcreative to get 25% off the first month on any of the gaming servers! [](https://www.patreon.com/creativemd)
